Solar & Lunar Eclipses {year}

Complete guide to all eclipses in {year}. Learn dates, timings, visibility, astrological effects, and important dos and don'ts during Grahan.

2026 Eclipse Overview

Solar Eclipses (Surya Grahan)

2 Solar Eclipses in 2026:

  • • March 17 - Partial Solar Eclipse
  • • September 12 - Annular Solar Eclipse

Lunar Eclipses (Chandra Grahan)

2 Lunar Eclipses in 2026:

  • • March 3 - Total Lunar Eclipse
  • • August 28 - Total Lunar Eclipse

Detailed Eclipse Information

Total Lunar Eclipse
पूर्ण चंद्र ग्रहण
March 3, 2026

Eclipse Details

Time (UTC):

05:33 - 09:27 UTC

Duration:

58 minutes (totality)

Zodiac Sign:

Virgo

Nakshatra:

Uttara Phalguni

Visibility

AmericasEuropeAfricaWestern Asia

Description

The first eclipse of {year} is a total lunar eclipse visible across the Americas, Europe, and Africa. The Moon will turn a deep red color during totality.

Astrological Effects

Emotional intensity, health matters surface, service-related changes, analytical insights.

Partial Solar Eclipse
आंशिक सूर्य ग्रहण
March 17, 2026

Eclipse Details

Time (UTC):

04:51 - 08:45 UTC

Duration:

Maximum coverage 94%

Zodiac Sign:

Pisces

Nakshatra:

Uttara Bhadrapada

Visibility

Northern EuropeNorthern AsiaNorthern North America

Description

A partial solar eclipse visible from northern regions. The Moon will cover up to 94% of the Sun's disk at maximum.

Astrological Effects

Spiritual awakening, endings and completions, hidden matters revealed, intuitive insights.

Total Lunar Eclipse
पूर्ण चंद्र ग्रहण
August 28, 2026

Eclipse Details

Time (UTC):

02:23 - 06:17 UTC

Duration:

63 minutes (totality)

Zodiac Sign:

Aquarius

Nakshatra:

Shatabhisha

Visibility

AmericasEuropeAfricaMiddle East

Description

The second total lunar eclipse of {year}, visible across much of the world. This is one of the longer total lunar eclipses.

Astrological Effects

Social changes, humanitarian concerns, technology disruptions, group dynamics shift.

Annular Solar Eclipse
वलयाकार सूर्य ग्रहण
September 12, 2026

Eclipse Details

Time (UTC):

14:23 - 18:17 UTC

Duration:

Ring of fire visible for 2 min 18 sec

Zodiac Sign:

Virgo

Nakshatra:

Hasta

Visibility

South AmericaAtlantic OceanAntarctica

Description

An annular solar eclipse creating a 'ring of fire' effect. The path of annularity crosses South America and the Atlantic.

Astrological Effects

Health focus, work changes, service improvements, analytical breakthroughs, skill development.

Do's During Eclipse
  • ✓Chant mantras and prayers during eclipse
  • ✓Take a bath before and after eclipse
  • ✓Meditate and practice spiritual activities
  • ✓Donate food and clothes after eclipse
  • ✓Keep tulsi leaves in food items
  • ✓Pregnant women should rest and chant mantras
  • ✓Clean your home after eclipse ends
  • ✓Offer water to the Sun after solar eclipse
Don'ts During Eclipse
  • ✗Avoid eating during eclipse (Sutak period)
  • ✗Don't start new ventures or sign contracts
  • ✗Avoid traveling during eclipse
  • ✗Don't look directly at solar eclipse
  • ✗Avoid cooking during eclipse
  • ✗Don't make important decisions
  • ✗Avoid sleeping during eclipse
  • ✗Don't use sharp objects
Eclipse Effects by Zodiac Sign
How the 2026 eclipses affect each zodiac sign

Aries

Health and service matters highlighted. Focus on daily routines and wellness practices.

Taurus

Creativity and romance affected. Children matters need attention. Speculative activities risky.

Gemini

Home and family matters surface. Property decisions need careful thought. Emotional foundations shift.

Cancer

Communication and siblings highlighted. Short travels affected. Learning opportunities arise.

Leo

Finances and values in focus. Income sources may change. Self-worth matters surface.

Virgo

Personal identity and self-expression highlighted. New beginnings possible. Health focus important.

Libra

Hidden matters and spirituality emphasized. Rest and retreat beneficial. Past karma surfaces.

Scorpio

Social circles and friendships affected. Group activities change. Long-term goals reassessed.

Sagittarius

Career and public image highlighted. Professional changes possible. Authority matters surface.

Capricorn

Higher learning and travel affected. Philosophical views shift. Legal matters need attention.

Aquarius

Transformation and shared resources highlighted. Joint finances need review. Deep changes occur.

Pisces

Partnerships and relationships in focus. Marriage matters highlighted. Contracts need review.

Understanding Eclipses in Vedic Astrology

In Vedic astrology, eclipses (Grahan) are considered powerful cosmic events that can trigger significant changes in our lives. Solar eclipses (Surya Grahan) occur during New Moon when the Moon blocks the Sun, while lunar eclipses (Chandra Grahan) occur during Full Moon when Earth's shadow falls on the Moon.

Eclipses are associated with the shadow planets Rahu and Ketu. Rahu causes solar eclipses by "swallowing" the Sun, while Ketu causes lunar eclipses. The effects of an eclipse are felt most strongly in the zodiac sign where it occurs and in the houses it activates in your birth chart.

The period before and after an eclipse is called Sutak, during which certain activities are traditionally avoided. However, this is also considered an auspicious time for spiritual practices, meditation, and mantra chanting. The energy of an eclipse can be harnessed for positive transformation when approached with awareness and intention.
